# Sutton Movers

> Family-owned moving company based in San Marcos, California. Fully insured, on-demand moving labor serving all of Southern California since 2020.

## About

Sutton Movers provides professional moving services across San Diego County, Riverside, the Inland Empire, Orange County, and Los Angeles. Services include local moving, long distance moving, commercial/office relocations, apartment moves, senior home moving, piano and safe moving, packing services, labor-only help, military base moves (PCS), junk removal, and furniture storage. The company operates two 26-ft trucks and offers both full-service moves and labor-only options. Military discounts are available.

## Contact

- Phone: (619) 602-3000
- Email: contactsuttonmovers@gmail.com
- Address: 536 Starling Way, San Marcos, CA 92069
- Hours: Monday-Sunday, 6:00 AM - 6:00 PM
- Website: https://suttonmovers.com

## Service Areas

San Diego, San Marcos, Escondido, Oceanside, Carlsbad, Encinitas, Vista, Del Mar, La Jolla, Chula Vista, El Cajon, La Mesa, Coronado, Temecula, Riverside, Murrieta, Irvine, Dana Point, Los Angeles, Poway, Rancho Bernardo, National City, Camp Pendleton, Corona, Menifee, Perris, Lake Elsinore, Hemet, San Jacinto, Moreno Valley, Beaumont, Wildomar, Fallbrook, Long Beach, Anaheim, Santa Ana, Huntington Beach, Newport Beach, Pasadena, Fullerton, Costa Mesa, Mission Viejo, San Clemente
